debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
G H : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ Measure.map (fun ω => G ω ⊓ H ω) P = @SimpleGraph.binomialRandom V (p * q)

failed_attempts:
by
    simpa [IsBinomialRandom] using
      (isBernoulliOn_edgeSet_binomialRandom (V := V) (p := p * q)).hasLaw_inf
        (G := fun ω ↦ (G ω).edgeSet) (H := fun ω ↦ (H ω).edgeSet) (P := P)
        ((isBernoulliOn_edgeSet_binomialRandom (V := V) (p := p)).hasLaw_of_hasLaw_edgeSet hG)
        ((isBernoulliOn_edgeSet_binomialRandom (V := V) (p := q)).hasLaw_of_hasLaw_edgeSet hY)
  aemeasurable := by
    have h1 : AEMeasurable G P := hG.aemeasurable
    have h2 : AEMeasurable H P := hY.aemeasurable
    exact (h1.inf h2)

by
    simpa [IsBinomialRandom] using (hG.inf hY)
  aemeasurable := sorry
